reviews.comment:
Exceeded all Expectations!  I thought I would be running in and getting a headshot.... lol
Plan on a few hours. You will need to spend some time getting comfortable with having your picture taken (which I am not), changing clothes and backgrounds, and then reviewing your pictures. I was super pleased with the whole engagement and my final pics were perfect! Highly recommend!
